plugins.name: 42crunch-api-security-testing
plugins.description:
Automate API security directly in Claude Code with 42Crunch. This plugin enables developers to audit OpenAPI specifications, detect OWASP API vulnerabilities including BOLA and BFLA, run live conformance and authorization tests, and apply AI-assisted fixes, all through natural language.
Designed for AI-assisted development workflows, the plugin provides continuous security guardrails across the full lifecycle of your API. It combines static analysis of OpenAPI definitions with dynamic runtime testing to ensure your APIs behave securely in real conditions.
With a simple audit to scan to remediate to validate loop, developers can identify issues early, fix them with confidence, and verify that security requirements are met before deployment. The plugin integrates seamlessly into Claude Code, allowing teams to embed API security directly into their development process without switching tools.
Key capabilities include static security audit of OpenAPI specifications with scored findings, detection of OWASP API Security risks including authorization flaws like BOLA and BFLA, live API scanning for conformance and runtime behavior validation, AI-assisted remediation with user-controlled changes, an end to end security testing pipeline combining audit and scan, and automatic generation of OpenAPI specifications from source code.
Whether you are working with existing APIs or generating new ones, 42Crunch helps ensure that security is built in from the start and continuously validated throughout development.

plugins.name: 8-habit-ai-dev
plugins.description:
8-habit-ai-dev replaces ad-hoc AI prompting with a structured 7-step workflow: Research →
  Requirements → Design → Breakdown → Build Brief → Review → Deploy. Each step maps to one of
  Stephen Covey's 8 Habits, providing both practical discipline and principled reasoning.

  Key features:
  - 17 hand-crafted skills with DAG-validated handoff chain
  - 472 automated assertions across 4 validator scripts (structure, skill-graph, content,
  verbosity)
  - Whole Person Model assessment (Body/Mind/Heart/Spirit scoring)
  - Maturity-adaptive verbosity via /calibrate (Dependence → Interdependence)
  - /reflect with dream-inspired lesson consolidation
  - /cross-verify 17-question checklist covering all 8 Habits
  - Composes cleanly with claude-governance plugin for compliance enforcement

  Pure markdown plugin — no runtime dependencies, no MCP servers, no external services.

plugins.name: ada-pdf-compliance
plugins.description:
Audit and fix PDF accessibility for ADA/Section 508/PDF-UA compliance — auto-generates alt text, link descriptions, structure trees, bookmarks, and metadata.

Key features:
- 18-check accessibility audit across Critical/Important/Advisory tiers
AI-generated alt text for every image (Claude reads pages visually — charts get data descriptions, screenshots get content summaries)
- AI-generated link descriptions replacing raw URLs with meaningful text
Structure tree generation for untagged PDFs — headings, paragraphs, lists, figures, tables, BDC/EMC marked content, tagged annotations
- Metadata auto-population — title, language, author, subject, PDF/UA identifier, display-title flag
- Bookmark generation from slide titles
Batch processing — process a whole folder, ask for author once, fix everything
- Two processing paths — Path A (Acrobat structure tree + plugin fixes) or Path B (fully automated, no Acrobat needed)
- Export results as markdown checklists or spreadsheets

plugins.name: architecture-studio
plugins.description:
Description:

Architecture Studio is a Claude plugin system for architects, designers, and AEC professionals. It includes 7 autonomous agents, 36 skills, 6 rules, and 3 hooks organized into 9 installable plugins — covering site research, NYC property due diligence, zoning envelope analysis, workplace programming, CSI specifications, sustainability (EPD parsing and comparison), FF&E product research, and presentation generation.

A single entry point (`/studio`) routes users to the right agent or skill based on natural language. Agents orchestrate multiple skills, exercise judgment, and hand off to each other across the project lifecycle. Skills ship with bundled reference data — NYC Zoning Resolution chapters, IBC occupancy load factors, workplace benchmarks, and Uruguay zoning regulations.

Key features:

- `/studio` smart router — describe your task, get routed automatically
- 7 agents with handoff logic (site planner → zoning expert → workplace strategist → materials researcher → FF&E designer → sustainability specialist → brand manager)
- Modular install — users pick the plugins they need
- 6 always-on rules governing units, code citations, disclaimers, CSI formatting, terminology, and output structure
- MIT licensed, open source

This plugin makes your AI coding agent an Arcjet security expert.

plugins.name: aria-knowledge
plugins.description:
ARIA is automated knowledge capture, management, and application for Claude Code. It actively learns during AI-assisted development sessions — insights, decisions, patterns, gotchas — and promotes validated knowledge into an indexed markdown knowledge base that is proactively applied in sessions and on every edit to improve development and accuracy. It runs in Claude Code, fully local. Core feature sets are:

Knowledge Lifecycle — automatic capture from conversations and pre-compaction transcripts, staging backlogs, review workflows, promotion to tagged files, staleness detection, and archival. A pipeline from raw signal to validated knowledge.

Decision Discipline — hook-enforced impact assessment on every file edit, change framework with scope verification, pre/post edit checks, configurable critical paths, and abbreviated mode for planning docs. Not guidelines — active enforcement.

Contextual Retrieval — tag-based indexing with cross-references, on-demand knowledge loading by topic, project tag expansion, entity detection, and session-start surfacing. The right knowledge at the right time.

ARIA — Anchored Reasoning and Insight Architecture  — is a human-in-the-loop knowledge kit focused on knowledge refinement and applied reasoning in Claude Code sessions.

Agentic Specification-Driven Development (ASDD) is a framework for building software using AI-assisted specifications, autonomous agents, and production learning loops. It transforms the traditional development lifecycle into a structured pipeline where specifications are the central artifact coordinating both humans and AI agents.
ASDD enables engineering teams to achieve dramatically higher output while maintaining architectural quality, security, and system observability by moving from human-centric agile processes to AI-native engineering.

plugins.name: billing-plane
plugins.description:
BillingPlane is a Stripe billing intelligence plugin for Claude that prevents common revenue-losing billing bugs during development.

Instead of adding another billing middleware or SDK into your production stack, BillingPlane works at build time. It teaches Claude how to generate correct billing logic, webhook handlers, entitlements, and usage billing patterns directly in your codebase.

BillingPlane encodes 4,000+ lines of production billing patterns including lifecycle handling, idempotent Stripe webhook processing, subscription state management, credit systems, and feature gating. When developers run BillingPlane commands, Claude generates production-ready billing code that follows strict guardrails used in real SaaS systems.

The result is a vendor-free billing architecture: developers keep full control of their code while avoiding common Stripe mistakes such as duplicate webhooks, incorrect subscription states, entitlement drift, or broken usage billing.

BillingPlane includes commands for auditing existing billing systems, discovering missing logic, implementing full billing infrastructure, and validating production safety.

No runtime dependency. No middleware. Just correct billing logic generated by Claude.

Ideal Users

BillingPlane is designed for:

SaaS founders building Stripe billing

AI-assisted coding workflows using Claude

teams implementing subscription or usage-based pricing

developers migrating away from billing middleware

engineers who want full ownership of billing code

Key Capabilities

Stripe lifecycle handling

subscription state management

entitlement systems

usage billing logic

concurrency safety patterns

webhook idempotency

credit systems

feature gating engines

It’s built around a clear charter, find and reproduce issues with evidence, not to debug or ship fixes unless you ask. It includes quick / standard / deep intensity, evidence bars by severity, a flaky vs confirmed split, optional JSON for filing tickets, and subagents tuned for API vs UI testing.

Requires only Python 3.9+ and Claude CLI.

Jurisdictions covered: Federal · Ontario · British Columbia · Alberta · Quebec

  /brand — Scans your LinkedIn profile, learns your story, and helps you write posts that sound like you (not like AI). Creates monthly content calendars,
  brainstorms ideas from your recent work, and offers hook variations to choose from. Supports any language.

  /career — Career co-pilot that considers your full picture: job search, side projects, and unique background. Evaluates job offers, optimizes your
  LinkedIn profile, builds networking strategies, and preps you for interviews with stories from your real experience.

  Includes a career-advisor agent that ensures your content strategy aligns with your career goals. Works for engineers, product managers, founders, career
   changers, and anyone who deserves to be visible for the work they do.

plugins.name: cc

See all active sessions on the same project, get file conflict warnings when two sessions touch the same file, and send messages between sessions — all automatically via hooks. Uses Claude Code's /tmp directories for instant liveness detection with zero configuration.

plugins.name: cc-boost
plugins.description:
cc-boost is an open-source Claude Code plugin that reduces token consumption by filtering noisy tool output before it reaches the context
  window. It strips ANSI escape codes, collapses repetitive npm/pip progress bars into single summary lines, and folds consecutive node_modules  stack frames into compact summaries — typically achieving 60–90% character reduction on verbose command output. It also intercepts interactive  scaffold commands (create-next-app, vite, sveltekit, remix, angular) that Claude cannot run interactively, prompting Claude to ask the user for  configuration choices first before re-running with the correct flags.

plugins.name: cc-dm
plugins.description: Peer-to-peer direct messaging between Claude Code sessions via the Channels protocol. Enables multi-session coordination through a shared SQLite message bus. Register sessions with human-readable names, send direct messages between sessions, broadcast to all active sessions, and check who's online — all without any network exposure.

plugins.name: cc-meme

plugins.name: cc-terminal-notifier
plugins.description: Native terminal notifications when Claude Code needs your attention

plugins.name: cc-wechat

Supports two-way messaging (receive WeChat messages, reply from Claude Code) and permission relay (approve/deny tool use from your phone). QR code login via MCP elicitation, sender allowlist for security, and cursor persistence across reconnects.

plugins.name: cc10x-router-owned-harness
plugins.description:
Supercharge Claude Code
with Orchestrated Skills, Subagents, Persistent Memory

plugins.name: ccguard
plugins.description: Security guard hook for Claude Code. Evaluates every tool call (Bash, Edit, Write, Read, MCP) against 864 pattern-matching rules to block dangerous commands, data exfiltration, and supply chain attacks. Zero external dependencies, written in Zig. Supports three decision levels: allow, deny (hard block), and ask (user confirmation prompt). Protects against reverse shells, pipe-to-interpreter execution, credential leakage, cloud metadata access, environment variable injection, and more.

plugins.name: cck

  CLAUDE.md template generator (/cck:setup).

CCX is a database as a service platform.

Four specialized agents (Skeptic, Sentinel, Architect, Pragmatist) take turns poking holes in your conclusions using actual codebase evidence — reading code, searching patterns, and checking git history. Auto-scales intensity from quick sanity checks to brutal multi-round reviews based on stakes. Includes a passive advisory agent that suggests challenging during high-stakes moments, and a report generator for audit trails.

plugins.name: change-management-plugin

Run a persistent daemon that accepts connections from multiple Claude sessions, routes messages between frontends and sessions, relays tool permission prompts for remote approval, and supports agent team coordination.
Includes native MCP permission relay, Telegram login for web access, per-session trust levels, file uploads to project folders, prompt tag toggles (TDD, Superpowers, etc.), and directory browser for spawning sessions.

plugins.name: char-index-skill

plugins.name: checkpoint-architect

plugins.name: checkpointarchitect
plugins.description:
CheckPoint Architect - 审查点构建助手
一个 Claude Code 插件，帮助产品经理通过引导式对话快速创建符合系统规范的审查点内容。

5种审查模式：
文书完整性检查
时限合规性检查
信息一致性检查
程序合规性检查
自定义逻辑
自动验证：内置验证器确保内容符合格式规范
可视化流程图：自动生成 Mermaid 和 ASCII 流程图

plugins.name: chess-coach-ai
plugins.description:
AI-powered chess coaching system with multi-agent cowork architecture. 4
  specialized agents work together to provide comprehensive coaching:

  • Intel — Opponent scouting via Lichess API, Opening Explorer analysis, player
   profiling with style classification
  • GM — Stockfish analysis with time-controlled profiles (quick/normal/deep),
  error classification by cognitive origin (tactical miss, conceptual weakness,
  pattern recognition failure, time pressure), DQM scoring, endgame tablebases,
  personalized training roadmaps
  • Mind — Complete 3-phase mental performance framework (based on Jared
  Tendler's methodology): self-awareness (7 tilt types), self-regulation
  (pre/during/post-game protocols), and opponent psychological conditioning
  • Biohack — Evidence-based nutrition, supplementation, sleep optimization, and
   full weekly preparation protocols timed to your game schedule

  Agents communicate via agent_notes system and the coordinator synthesizes
  their outputs. Includes scoresheet/board photo scanning, local game vault, and
   Stockfish WASM fallback (no install required).

plugins.name: chinese-llm-models
plugins.description: A unified API gateway that provides access to 6+ leading Chinese AI models (Kimi K2.5, Qwen3 Max, DeepSeek V3.2, GLM-5, MiniMax M2.1, Seed 1.8) through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Features pay-per-use pricing, automatic cost tracking, and seamless integration with existing OpenAI client code.

plugins.name: chisel
plugins.description:
Chisel is a Claude Code plugin for PR refinement driven by automated review.

Instead of treating local checks as the final evaluator, Chisel assumes the strongest critic is an external PR review system (Greptile).

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

plugins.name: chub
plugins.description: Fetches curated, versioned API docs from Context Hub before writing code — so Claude uses current APIs instead of hallucinating from training data. Auto-installs via npx (no global setup), refreshes the doc registry each session, and supports search, annotations, and feedback. Works with 1500+ documented libraries including OpenAI, Stripe, Anthropic, and more.

plugins.name: chuck
plugins.description: Smart context injection for Claude Code — injects relevant rules per prompt, remembers architectural decisions, catches contradictions in real-time

plugins.name: circle

plugins.name: circumpunct-ethics-virtues-plugin
plugins.description:
This is an ethical reasoning and diagnostic plugin based on four pillars (Good, Right, True, Agreement) kept alive by four corresponding virtues (Plasticity, Access, Curiosity, Validation).

This tool can detect cognitive viruses. A cognitive virus transmits through language, which means AI systems trained on human text inherit the same performed-ethics patterns (like narcissistic dynamics). This plugin serves as a perceptual calibration tool for both humans and AI: the diagnostic framework works the same way regardless of whether the host is biological or computational.

plugins.name: cite2fn
plugins.description:
A Claude Code plugin that converts hyperlinked citations, parenthetical references, and inline author-date mentions in Word documents into properly formatted Bluebook footnotes or endnotes.

Key features
- Detects 5 citation patterns: external hyperlinks, internal anchor links, parentheticals, inline author-date, and existing footnotes
- Handles split hyperlinks from Google Docs exports (where a single citation spans multiple XML elements)
- Fetches bibliographic metadata from academic sources (arXiv, SSRN, DOI, ACM DL, and more)
- Supports both footnotes and endnotes with arabic numeral numbering
- Preserves author names that are grammatically part of a sentence
- Tracks repeated sources for Id. and supra short forms
- Adds Word comments to flag anything that needs manual attention
- Removes the References section after its content has been moved to footnotes
Interactive review — Claude shows you every citation before modifying the document

plugins.name: civic
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to Civic for guardrails, scoped permissions, audit trails, and revocable access control. Every tool call is logged, permissions are user-controlled, and access can be revoked instantly.

plugins.name: clarity
plugins.description: Clarity explains what Claude Code built in language anyone can understand. You can ask Claude to explain things, but that only works when you know what to ask about. Clarity walks through everything systematically, catching changes you didn't notice and decisions you didn't realise were made. Run /clarity:explain for a quick answer. Run /clarity:session after a build. Run /clarity:project for the full picture. Every explanation ends with prompts for your next se...

plugins.name: claudaborative-editing
plugins.description:
An MCP server that connects Claude to WordPress's real-time collaborative editing system. Claude joins as a live collaborator in the Gutenberg block editor. Edits appear progressively in the browser as Claude types, and changes from human editors sync back instantly. Built on the same Yjs CRDT protocol that powers Gutenberg's native multi-user editing, so all changes merge automatically without conflicts.

Claude can read and edit post content at the block level, insert and rearrange blocks of any type (including third-party plugin blocks), manage post metadata like categories, tags, publication status, and excerpts, upload media, and leave editorial notes on individual blocks. A companion WordPress plugin (optional) adds AI action buttons directly in the editor toolbar, letting authors trigger proofreading, review, translation, and editing tasks without leaving the browser.

plugins.name: claude-account-guard
plugins.description:
A Claude Code plugin that warns or blocks prompts when the active Claude account doesn't match the expected account for the current directory.

Useful for teams or individuals who switch between work and personal Claude accounts and want a guardrail against accidentally using the wrong one.

plugins.name: claude-alert
plugins.description: Never miss a Claude Code approval prompt. Native sound + banner notifications, smart risk classification (high/medium/low), and full audit trail. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

plugins.name: claude-alloy
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration harness for Claude Code. Adds 11 specialized agents (Steel orchestrates, Mercury searches, Tungsten executes), 11 automatic hooks (typecheck, lint, branch protection, write guard, AI slop detection), 8 skills, and 10 slash commands. Agents are tiered by model — Opus for orchestration and judgment, Sonnet for implementation and research, Haiku for fast search. One command to activate globally, one command to revert. Preserves existing Claude Code settings.

plugins.name: claude-auto-setup
plugins.description:
claude-auto-setup is shipped as package + claude skill.

One prompt more. That's all it costs to have Claude Code search the web, find the right skills, MCPs, hooks, and agents for your task, configure everything automatically, and put your work in an isolated environment you can resume, share, or discard cleanly.

claude-auto-setup enables the creation of the best set of skills completely automatically without the need of manual setup and project engineering: those steps are crucial for a big project or enterprise repo but most of the times with the smaller tasks none of this is worht to be setted up. The package is seamlessy integrated with the skill and enable the creation of a whole set of configs, that can be coupled with one or more claude chats and remains completely isolated thanks to a dedicated worktree.

plugins.name: claude-backup
plugins.description: Back up and restore your Claude Code environment

  scoring. Write, rewrite, analyze, and optimize blog posts for Google rankings (December 2025 Core Update, E-E-A-T)
  and AI citations (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews). Includes persona-driven writing, fact-checking against cited
  sources, keyword cannibalization detection, CMS taxonomy sync (WordPress, Shopify, Ghost, Strapi, Sanity),
  NotebookLM source-grounded research, Gemini TTS audio narration, AI image generation, editorial calendars,
  SERP-informed outlines, JSON-LD schema markup, and multi-platform content repurposing.

plugins.name: claude-bot
plugins.description:
Persistent Claude Code agent with long-term memory, cron jobs, and a background daemon

Your AI assistant that actually remembers. claude-bot runs a persistent Claude Code session as a background daemon, with an Obsidian-style memory graph that persists across all sessions and restarts. Ask it about your projects, deadlines, and decisions from any Claude Code session — it knows the context.

plugins.name: claude-career-plugin
plugins.description: AI job search command center for Claude Code. Evaluate job offers with fit scoring, generate tailored CVs and cover letters, scan 45+ company career portals automatically, track applications with a built-in pipeline, and prepare for interviews with STAR+R story generation. Turns Claude Code into a full recruiting assistant.

plugins.name: claude-cast
plugins.description: Stream Twitch, YouTube, and Kick live streams alongside your Claude Code sessions. Audio plays via mpv, live chat scrolls in a neo-blessed TUI side pane with colored usernames and badges, and an animated    waveform visualizer shows playback status. Three layout modes (compact, rich, minimal), full slash command control (/claude-cast pause, mute, volume, stop), and keyboard shortcuts for hands-free control.      Twitch chat works zero-config, YouTube and Kick supported out of the box. Runs in a tmux split pane so your coding workflow stays uninterrupted.

plugins.name: claude-channel-mattermost
plugins.description: An MCP server that connects Mattermost to Claude Code — send and receive messages, manage files, and control access through a bot account.

plugins.name: claude-channel-whatsapp
plugins.description: WhatsApp messaging bridge via WhatsApp Web with built-in access control

plugins.name: claude-chat-search
plugins.description: Full-text search across all Claude Code conversations. Search through conversation content including messages, tool results, and code — find any past discussion instantly. Works locally, no external services needed.

plugins.name: claude-co2-status-line
plugins.description:
Adds a status line that estimates the environmental cost of your Claude Code session in real time. Shows cumulative energy usage (Wh), CO2       
  emissions (g), water consumption (ml), and token count — updated after every interaction. Based on published research from Epoch AI, with all 
  formulas and sources documented. Supports wrapping existing statuslines and opt-in all-time tracking.

plugins.name: claude-code-achievements
plugins.description: Steam-style achievement system for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-code-bootstrapper
plugins.description: Analyze any project and generate a complete .claude/ automation structure: agents, pipelines, skills, memory, hooks, and settings. Supports fresh generation and validation modes.

plugins.name: claude-code-el-coderabbit
plugins.description: CodeRabbit event source for the el plugin. Poll for new code reviews, comments, and thread replies on your pull requests as background events in Claude Code. When CodeRabbit posts a review or comment on a PR, it fires a task notification with the review details — letting your agent respond to code review feedback automatically. Supports thread reply detection for multi-turn review conversations. Requires the el event listener plugin and a GitHub repository with CodeRabbit enabled.

plugins.name: claude-code-el-sendgrid
plugins.description: SendGrid inbound email event source for the el plugin. Receive and process incoming emails via SendGrid Inbound Parse webhook as background events in Claude Code. When an email arrives, it fires a task notification with sender, subject, and body — letting your agent react to emails without polling. Requires the el event listener plugin and a SendGrid account with Inbound Parse configured.

plugins.name: claude-code-el-slack
plugins.description: Slack event source for the el (event-listeners) plugin. Listens for real Slack messages via a one-shot webhook server with high watermark deduplication, bot filtering, edit detection, and @mention handling. Enables Claude Code agents to respond to Slack channel activity in real time without polling. Pairs with ngrok for public webhook URLs.

plugins.name: claude-code-hermit
plugins.description: Persistent autonomous assistant with session discipline, crash recovery, learning loop, daily rhythm, and phone control via channels & remote control. Runs always-on in Docker — one plugin, unlimited personal assistants.

plugins.name: claude-code-music
plugins.description: Intelligent coding DJ for Claude Code. Adjusts Spotify music based on your coding mood, activity, and preferences. Includes /music commands (focus, hype, chill, debug, refactor, flow), automatic mood detection from prompts, audio TTS announcements for time and task completions, session-start auto-play, and a status line showing the current song.

plugins.name: claude-code-notify
plugins.description:
claude-code-notify sends a desktop notification whenever Claude Code finishes responding, so you never miss a prompt while working across multiple sessions.

Each notification shows your session name (from /rename) and the first 80 characters of Claude's last response, giving you context at a glance. When running in tmux, the notification includes the window index so you know exactly where to switch.

The plugin is focus-aware: if you're already looking at the Claude session (detected via tmux pane, window, and terminal focus state), the notification is suppressed. 
On macOS without tmux, it checks whether your terminal app is frontmost. 
A 5-second debounce prevents notification spam during rapid tool calls.

Works on Linux (notify-send) and macOS (osascript). 
Requires jq and bash 4+. 
tmux is optional but recommended for the best experience.

Configuration is zero-config by default, with two optional environment variables: CLAUDE_NOTIFY_CONTEXT (adds a Work/Personal prefix) and CLAUDE_NOTIFY_URGENCY (sets notification priority).

Includes /notify-help and /notify-test slash commands for easy setup verification.

plugins.name: claude-code-organizer
plugins.description: Visual dashboard to organize all your Claude Code memories, skills, MCP servers, hooks, and configs. View everything in a scope hierarchy (Global > Workspace > Project), drag-and-drop items between scopes, search and filter across all customizations, preview file contents — all from a zero-dependency web UI.

plugins.name: claude-code-plugin-for-goodmem-a-memory-infra-for-agents
plugins.description: With this plugin, you can operate Goodmem's memory infra in plain English, to create, manage, and orchestrate embedders, rerankers, and LLMs, to ingest and create memories from files, base64 strings, and plain text, and to build knowledge-powered agents, such as RAG and Deep Research.

plugins.name: claude-code-survival-kit
plugins.description: 10 slash commands and 3 agent definitions distilled from 6 months of daily Claude Code use. Not a framework -- just the patterns that survived: multi-agent build pipelines, parallel task dispatch, security audits, session handoffs, and more.

plugins.name: claude-code-task-management
plugins.description: Track tasks, finalize sessions, resume context — all through natural language.

plugins.name: claude-code-vulnerability-check
plugins.description:
Detect CVE (Common Vulnerability Exposure) in PHP / JS project.
Auto apply minor fixes and patch
Alert on necessity of major update (prevent breaking changes)

plugins.name: claude-code-workflow
plugins.description: Six focused slash commands for safer, more deliberate coding sessions. Save and restore named git checkpoints, review diffs before committing, analyze blast radius before changing code, run targeted tests against changed files, and orient quickly in any codebase — all without leaving the Claude Code CLI.

plugins.name: claude-codex-loop
plugins.description:
claude-codex-loop orchestrates a structured collaboration loop between Claude Code (designer/reviewer) and OpenAI Codex (auditor/implementer). It runs two stages — design and code — each with up to 5 rounds of iterative review plus an independent validation pass.

How it works:
  - Brainstorming (optional) — Explore requirements interactively before designing
  - Design stage — Claude Code writes a spec, Codex audits it independently each round until convergence
  - User gate — You review and approve the design before any code is written
  - Code stage — Codex implements, Claude Code reviews the full diff each round
  - Independent validation — A separate audit pass with zero prior context to catch groupthink

All work happens on a dedicated branch. Cancel anytime with /cancel-review to cleanly restore your starting state.

Commands: /review-loop <task>, /cancel-review

plugins.name: claude-cognis
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code powered by Cognis. Automatically loads relevant context at the start of every session and saves session summaries when you stop — so Claude remembers what you've been working on across sessions. Supports personal memory (private to you) and team memory (shared across your repo). Includes semantic search, codebase indexing, and smart context assembly via MCP tools, skills, and hooks.

plugins.name: claude-context-optimizer
plugins.description: Audit and optimize Claude Code context window usage. Runs a 9-phase analysis covering plugins, hooks, CLAUDE.md cascade, MCP servers, environment settings, zombie process detection, and subagent session accumulation. Produces a scored report with actionable fixes. Real-world tested: achieved 50% token reduction and 69% memory savings on heavy agentic workflows.

plugins.name: claude-cost-tracker
plugins.description: Real-time token usage and cost analytics for Claude Code. Automatically tracks spend per developer, project, and session via a PostToolUse hook. Includes budget enforcement with daily/weekly/monthly caps and macOS notifications, multi-model pricing (Sonnet 4.5, Opus, Haiku), a slash command for instant cost reports, a conversational agent skill for natural-language cost queries, and an optional full Next.js analytics dashboard. Local-first — all data stays on your machine in SQLite unless you enable optional team sync.

plugins.name: claude-cowork-personal-context-loader
plugins.description:
Claude starts fresh every session. This plugin fixes that — it automatically loads your personal context doc from Google Drive at the start of every Cowork session, so Claude always knows who you are and how you work. No commands needed.
Selling points:

-- Zero friction. Context loads silently at session start. Claude immediately works in your voice, with your priorities.
-- Cross-device. Installs at the account level — works on desktop, mobile, everywhere.
-- Guided setup. Say "set up my context" and Claude builds your doc for you, then saves it to Drive.
-- Always current. Update your doc anytime. Say "refresh my context" and it takes effect instantly.

** Currently, it will require the user to say "refresh context" with every project.  Once hook support for refresh-context is added by Claude team, this will be automatic with no user input needed!

plugins.name: claude-crap
plugins.description:
Deterministic Quality Assurance plugin for Claude Code. CRAP stands for Change Risk Anti-Patterns — a metric originally developed by Alberto Savoia and Bob Evans at Google in 2007 to identify code that is both complex and under-tested. Inspired by their work.

Claude-crap wraps every Write, Edit, and Bash tool call with a PreToolUse gatekeeper, a PostToolUse verifier, and a Stop quality gate backed by the CRAP index, Technical Debt Ratio, tree-sitter AST metrics, and SARIF 2.1.0 reports. Auto-detects and runs ESLint, Semgrep, Bandit, and Stryker at boot so users get real A..E quality grades out of the box. Forbids the agent from writing functional code before a test safety net exists (the Golden Rule).

plugins.name: claude-crew
plugins.description:
Claude Crew — Mobile Agent Harness
A Claude Code plugin for Android & iOS mobile teams. Installs 8 specialist agents, 5 slash commands, lifecycle hooks, and coding rules in one script.

plugins.name: claude-cursor-orchestration
plugins.description:
Claude Code + Cursor Agent orchestration system. Delegates coding tasks to Cursor Agent via ACP bridge │
  │              │  with Phase 0-8 pipeline.

plugins.name: claude-dev-standards

plugins.name: claude-discord-status

plugins.name: claude-education-skills-library

Covers curriculum design, lesson planning, assessment, learning science, wellbeing, EAL, professional learning, and AI tutoring design across 14 domains. Every skill is grounded in named peer-reviewed research with explicit evidence ratings. Frameworks without empirical support (learning styles, brain gym, VAK) are excluded by design. Agent Skills 1.0 compliant with progressive disclosure, auto-activation, typed YAML schemas, and chaining metadata. Live MCP server included. CC BY-SA 4.0.

plugins.name: claude-eta
plugins.description: Task duration tracker and estimator for Claude Code. Silently times every task, classifies it, and builds a local velocity profile. After 10 tasks of the same type, injects calibrated ETAs at the start of Claude's responses using your real project data. Detects repair loops by fingerprinting error content (not just count) and intervenes before tokens are wasted. Includes a hallucinated-estimate detector that corrects Claude's time claims inline. 100% local, zero telemetry, opt-in community baselines via Supabase.

plugins.name: claude-flow
plugins.description:

  deep-task engine, persistent DAG scheduler, adversarial code review, bug diagnosis, feature planning, brainstorming), 3 specialized
   agents (feature-builder, code-reviewer, test-writer), and 5 hooks (file protection, bash validation, lint feedback, session state
  persistence, context reinjection). Helps Claude Code work on complex, multi-step engineering tasks with structure, verification,
  and continuity.

plugins.name: claude-forge
plugins.description: Evidence-first Claude Code plugin for repeatable, spec-driven development workflows.

plugins.name: claude-gauge

When the person picking up the project starts, Claude proactively walks them through everything and surfaces relevant context as they work. plugins.name: claude-library

plugins.name: claude-live-title

- Smart throttling: first message triggers immediately, then rate-limited to save API calls
- Non-blocking: all hooks run async, zero impact on your workflow
- Configurable: model, language, throttle interval, title length — all adjustable via /claude-live-title:config
- Works with Claude HUD: titles are displayed in the statusline when paired with claude-hud plugin
- Cross-platform: Linux and macOS supported
- Zero dependencies: only requires bash and jq (no npm, no pip)

Addresses windows and tabs by stable AppleScript string IDs instead of ordinal indices. Zero user configuration, zero dependencies, shellcheck + shfmt clean.

Uses a two-tier severity system: errors block the write with detailed remediation guidance, while warnings allow the write but inject advisory context. Runs as pure Node.js wi...

Comprehensive SEO analysis plugin for Claude Code. Performs full site audits with 11 parallel subagents and 0-100 health scoring across technical SEO (crawlability, indexability, Core Web Vitals, security), content quality (E-E-A-T framework), schema markup (JSON-LD detection, validation, generation), image optimization, XML sitemap
  analysis, AI search optimization (GEO for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity), local SEO  (GBP, NAP, citations, reviews, map pack), maps intelligence (geo-grid ranking, competitor radius), hreflang/i18n, programmatic SEO, and strategic planning. 17 skills,  11 agents. Auto-detects industry type (SaaS, e-commerce, local, publisher, agency). Optional DataForSEO MCP extension for live SERP and keyword data.

Provides 13 slash commands covering keyword research with clustering and intent mapping, technical site audits scored 0-100, on-page content scoring with E-E-A-T analysis, JSON-LD schema generation, Google Business Profile 30-day posting calendars, competitor backlink analysis with 90-day outreach plans, and AI search optimization for Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and ChatGPT. Built for agencies with multi-client...

205 production-ready Claude Code skills, plugins, and agent skills for 11 AI coding tools.

claude-snapshot exports and imports portable snapshots of your entire Claude Code setup across machines. It captures settings.json, plugins,
  marketplace registrations, hooks, and global CLAUDE.md files into a single .tar.gz file with a manifest index. Absolute paths are normalized to
  $HOME for cross-machine portability. On apply, it backs up conflicting files as .bak and installs missing plugins automatically. Supports slim
  (config only, ~6KB) and full (with plugin caches for offline restore) export modes.

ClaudeTokenSAP is a Claude Code plugin marketplace focused on reducing context waste and improving session efficiency.

Its first plugin, Token Optimizer, helps developers reduce token usage by preprocessing large JSON, compressing logs and search results, blocking noisy directories, preventing duplicate file reads, and preserving high-signal memory across long-running sessions.

Key features include smart context clarification, JSON-to-schema compression, log summarization, token budget tracking, smart blocking, precision grep compression, and session continuity hooks.

Typical workflows can see up to 70% token reduction, allowing longer Claude Code sessions with better reasoning quality.

One install, three composable plugins: ai-iq (SQLite long-term memory + W3C Verifiable Credentials), circus (federated agent commons with passport-based trust), and bot-circus (multi-bot Telegram runtime with persona and shared/ringfenced memory). The first open-source stack where agents earn access to each other's knowledge through verifiable track records.

Webhooks and cron scheduling for Claude Code. Receive events
  from external services like GitHub, Stripe, and Sentry, route
  them to the right session, and let Claude act on them

  time, and survive connection drops.

It adds identity, personality, long-term memory, lifecycle hooks, memory consolidation (“dreaming”), voice support, web hooks, messaging integrations, and a one-way import path from OpenClaw. The goal is to make Claude Code feel less like a fresh assistant on every launch and more like a continuous agent that remembers context, adapts to the user, and maintains a stable sense of self across sessions.

plugins.name: cm64

plugins.name: cmux-mcp
plugins.description:
MCP server that gives AI agents full control of your cmux terminal — run commands, read output, and send control characters. Works in the
  background via Unix socket with no focus stealing. Smart command completion detection via CPU monitoring.

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic is a real-time prompt coaching system that activates automatically on every response. It shows a persistent status line tracking your current AI persona, prompt quality, and context window health. When your prompt could be sharper, it suggests an improved version and explains why in one sentence — then waits for your choice. Over days, it tracks your prompt quality percentage (users typically progress from 45% to 91% clear prompts in 10 days). It auto-detects the right expert persona for each question, teaches you prompting techniques by naming them when you use them naturally, and generates context handoff summaries before your conversation degrades. Works as a learning flywheel: you correct the AI, it captures the lesson as a generative principle, applies it going forward, and both sides get sharper. Five protocols, zero configuration — just say "cod" to activate.

plugins.name: co2-tracker
plugins.description: Track the carbon footprint of your Claude Code sessions. Adds a live CO2 estimate to the status line, persists sessions to a local SQLite database, and generates shareable PNG report cards. Based on peer-reviewed emission factors from Jegham et al. 2025.

and quality issues with confidence-based filtering (only reports findings above 
80% confidence). Includes an auto-fix mode that reviews, fixes issues, and 
re-reviews until clean or max iterations reached.

plugins.name: colosseum
plugins.description:
proven wrong by search results, and earn scores based on accuracy and independence — not agreement. A built-in Devil's Advocate challenges the final synthesis before it's delivered.    
                                                                                                                                                                                           
  How it works:                                                                                                                                                                            
  1. Builds a fact base from opposing-angle web searches                                                                                                                                   
  2. Each agent declares an independent position (blind draft — no agent sees others before submitting)                                                                                    
  3. Agents debate up to 5 rounds: Prosecutor attacks, Defender responds, Adverse Witness probes shared blind spots                                                                        
  4. Role-switch gate fires when agents start citing the same sources or hit deadlock                                                                                                      
  5. Devil's Advocate challenges the final answer; a quantitative score (Accuracy · Evidence · Independence) determines whether it stands                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                           
  Works with Gemini CLI, Codex, aichat, or llm. Falls back to Claude's four internal roles (Pragmatist / Skeptic / Idealist / Realist) with zero setup.

plugins.description: Reviews startup competition T&Cs and produces a neutral, evidence-first scorecard across 7 founder-calibrated dimensions: IP & ownership, equity & financial, exclusivity & restraint, publicity & data, commitment cost, jurisdiction & disputes, and prize mechanics. Every flag quotes the clause verbatim with a source reference. Flags what T&Cs say AND what they don't say (omission detection). Investment-term deep dive for SAFE/convertible-note prizes. Cross-competition side-by-side comparison. Optional founder profile enables Fit Analysis and ROI Factors. Input-agnostic — accepts URLs, PDFs, screenshots, or pasted text. Falls back to browser automation when sites block AI fetchers. Neutral by design: never says "apply" or "don't apply" — surfaces the clauses, you decide.

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description:
Teach Claude to orchestrate microservices and business processes with Conductor. This skill adds full workflow lifecycle management: define workflows with any task type (HTTP, SWITCH, FORK_JOIN, WAIT, HUMAN), run them synchronously or asynchronously, monitor executions, and manage failures with pause/resume/retry/restart.

  Key capabilities:
  - Create workflow definitions with proper JSON schema and input expressions
  - Start, monitor, and search workflow executions by status, time, or correlation ID
  - Signal WAIT and HUMAN tasks for human-in-the-loop patterns
  - Scaffold workers in Python, JavaScript, Java, Go, C#, Ruby, or Rust
  - Visualize workflows as Mermaid diagrams
  - Manage multiple environments with CLI profiles
  - Enterprise features: schedules, secrets, webhooks (Orkes)

  Works with any Conductor server — local development or remote. Installs and configures the conductor CLI automatically.

plugins.name: council-of-experts
plugins.description:
Apologies, this plugin does not exist yet - it is submitted to guage the viability of approval before starting work
===
Council of Experts is your permanent advisory board — a panel of AI advisors that challenges your thinking, debates each other, and builds institutional memory across a series of related decisions over time.
Rather than a single balanced-sounding answer, it forces genuine disagreement between advisors with opposing mandates. A Chairman weighs the conflict, delivers a structured verdict, and tracks which advisors were right. The panel gets sharper the more you use it.
The free panel includes six advisors: Optimist, Pessimist, Devil's Advocate, Pragmatist, Behaviourist, and Chairman. Works for any domain where decisions compound — investment portfolios, product roadmaps, marketing strategy, financial planning, or any ongoing programme where today's choice affects tomorrow's options.
⚠ This tool helps you think more rigorously. It does not provide financial, legal, medical, or professional advice. You are responsible for all decisions you make.

For self-reflection and learning ONLY. Not a replacement for professional psychotherapy. Invoke /counsel.

plugins.description: Complete CTO & Staff Engineer toolkit: 24 skills covering code review, architecture, DevOps, security, testing, and engineering management

plugins.name: ctx
plugins.description: A context layer for multi-repo workspaces. Maps features across repositories with product definitions, engineering contracts, and implementation docs — designed for AI-assisted development.

plugins.name: ctxforge
plugins.description: Context engineering for AI coding agents — assemble, compress, and export perfect context bundles with live token counting. 15 MCP tools for building context bundles, managing profiles, persistent memory, and prompt templates.

plugins.name: cv-skills
plugins.description: Skills for performing classical image processing operations: format conversion, SVG rendering, resize/crop/rotate, color adjustment, filters, segmentation/morphology, and compositing/blending

plugins.name: cxpak
plugins.description: Token-budgeted codebase context for Claude Code. One call to auto_context gives Claude the optimal context for any task — automatically selecting, ranking, noise-filtering, and packing the most relevant code from your entire codebase. 11 MCP tools including symbol tracing, blast radius analysis, API surface extraction, and semantic search. Supports 42 programming languages via tree-sitter.

plugins.name: cyber-punk
plugins.description: Automated security vulnerability scanner for Claude Code. Fetches CVE/CWE data from NIST NVD, scans code for vulnerable patterns across 9 languages (JS/TS, Python, Go, Java, Rust, PHP, Ruby, C/C++), generates proof-of-concept exploit scripts, and produces detailed security reports with root cause analysis (WHY/HOW/WHAT) for each finding.

plugins.name: cyclebottom-risk
plugins.description:
Real-time risk levels for crypto and stock indices from CycleBottom. Returns a normalized 0-1 risk score based on logarithmic
  deviation from the 365-day moving average for BTC, ETH, ADA, SOL, BNB, LINK, Dow Jones, S&P 500, and NASDAQ. Low risk means
  historically cheap (accumulation zone), high risk means historically overvalued (distribution zone). Just ask "What's the BTC risk?"
  or "Is the S&P 500 overvalued?" and get instant data.

plugins.name: cync
plugins.description: Cync backs up and syncs your Claude Code settings to any Git repository. Push  your ~/.claude/ configuration from one machine and pull it on another — keeping CLAUDE.md, custom skills, commands, memory, and settings in sync across all your devices. Features module-based selective sync, sensitive data scanning, optional AES-256-GCM encryption, dry-run previews, and interactive conflict resolution.

plugins.name: d2c
plugins.description: Turn Figma frames into production-ready code that uses your existing components, your design tokens, and your framework conventions. d2c scans your codebase, builds a design contract, then generates, screenshots, pixel-diffs, and iterates until the output matches the design. Four skills — init, build, audit, guard — cover the full lifecycle from token extraction to ongoing drift enforcement. Supports React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, and Astro.

plugins.name: daft
plugins.description: Skills for working with Daft, a high-performance data engine for AI and multimodal workloads. Includes UDF performance tuning, distributed scaling with Ray, and documentation navigation.

plugins.name: daily-journal
plugins.description: Plugin description: Conversational daily journaling for Obsidian vaults. Interviews you about your day, detects your emotional altitude using a 34-floor framework (from survival-mode lows to flow-state highs), tracks habits (gym, sleep, meditation), and saves structured markdown entries with YAML frontmatter. Optional advisory panel adds 1-2 sentences of pushback from named advisors. Works with any Obsidian vault.

plugins.name: daily-productivity-for-devs
plugins.description: Plugin that helps devs with common productivity things outside of coding

plugins.name: daloopa
plugins.description: Financial analysis skills powered by Daloopa's institutional-grade data

plugins.name: dalykit
plugins.description: End-to-end data analysis workflow plugin for Claude Code. Covers the full pipeline from EDA to model training - EDA, preprocessing, statistical analysis, feature engineering, and ML model evaluation — all saved under a structured `dalykit/` folder.

plugins.name: darce
plugins.description: Stop vibecoding blind. Darce teaches you what the AI just built, concept breakdowns, pattern analysis, and quizzes on your actual code. Three modes: Ship (just code), Understand (see explanations), Learn (get quizzed)

plugins.name: dark-factory
plugins.description:
Autonomous AI development pipeline that ships code without human intervention. 
Implements the Dark Factory pattern with governance tiers (T0-T4), multi-run 
holdout validation with quorum voting, two-pass adversarial satisfaction testing, 
and the Ralph Wiggum loop for continuous backlog consumption. Each task runs in 
fresh context to prevent drift, with automatic guardrails that learn from past 
failures. Configurable risk scoring routes low-risk changes to auto-merge while 
escalating high-risk changes for human review.

plugins.name: data-converter-plugin
plugins.description: Convert data from input .xlsx/.csv files into target

plugins.name: data-engineering
plugins.description: Data engineering plugin - warehouse exploration, pipeline authoring, Airflow integration

plugins.name: datadog
plugins.description: Use Datadog directly in Claude Code through a preconfigured Datadog MCP server. Query logs, metrics, traces, dashboards, and more through natural conversation. This plugin is in preview.

plugins.name: datadops
plugins.description:
DatadOps is an Intelligent advanced Datadog workflows for Claude Code .
It transforms raw monitoring data into actionable insights through intelligent DatadOps automation.
This is a lightweight wrapper plugin that adds intelligent workflows on top of the official Datadog MCP server. While the official server provides access to raw Datadog data, this plugin orchestrates that data into complete operational workflows.
- Service Health Dashboards
- Incident Response Automation
- Performance Investigation
- Deployment Validation

plugins.name: datafrey
plugins.description: Talk to your database. Use to run queries, get schema context, and write SQL faster.

plugins.name: datahub-skills

plugins.name: dataslayer-marketing-skills
plugins.description: Marketing analysis suite with 7 skills and 4 parallel agents — audit paid campaigns, find SEO opportunities, detect churn signals, and generate branded PDF reports. Powered by a tested analysis engine (ds_utils.py, 113 functions). Works automatically with Dataslayer MCP or manually with CSV/JSON data.

plugins.name: dataverse
plugins.description: Agent skills for building on, analyzing, and managing Microsoft Dataverse — with Dataverse MCP, PAC CLI, and Dataverse Python SDK.

plugins.name: dayletus-holiday-rental-income-estimator
plugins.description: Estimate annual holiday rental income for properties in the UK and France based on real Airbnb market data. Provide your property details — type, location, bedrooms, and guest capacity — and get a projected annual revenue figure, average daily rate, and occupancy rate drawn from comparable listings in your area.

plugins.name: daytona
plugins.description: An agent skill for creating and running sandboxes on the Daytona platform.

plugins.description: First-party Daytona Platforms Inc. Skills-only, 176 reference files. Apache-2.0.

plugins.name: db-migration-guard
