plugins.name: tray-api
plugins.description: Complete plugin for integrating with the Tray E-commerce platform APIs. Provides 34 skills, 5 specialized agents, and 3 commands covering 150+ endpoints. Includes OAuth authentication flows, catalog and order management, shipping and payment configuration, webhooks, migration from other platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, VTEX, Nuvemshop), and integration validation for app certification.

plugins.name: trip1
plugins.description: Trip1 is a hotel booking plugin for agents. It pairs the trivial-corp/agents skill with the Trip1 MCP server to search 3M+ hotels across 200+ countries, compare rates, and book rooms. Payment runs over x402 on Base (USDC) inside the same request, with a fallback URL for any client without an x402-capable wallet.

plugins.name: truehue
plugins.description:
True Hue runs a protocol modeled on what a certified color analyst runs in a $300–$400 in-person consultation. That means five calibrated photos, a 15+ item questionnaire, and four-dimension analysis (undertone, value, chroma, contrast) with evidence cited from specific photos and answers. Before a season is named, a mandatory mid-analysis check-in catches misreads. After draping comparison against both adjacent seasons, you get the full deliverable: ~36 hex codes by wardrobe role, colors to avoid with reasons, metals, neutrals specifically tailored ("your black," "your white," "your navy"), pattern and fabric guidance, and a shoppable starter capsule at two budget tiers.

The plugin covers four modes — full analysis, closet audit, single-item check, palette refinement — and honors genuine ambiguity with a between-seasons protocol instead of forcing binary verdicts. Deep skin and olive complexions are first-class cases, not afterthoughts. Color-blind users get an opt-in accessible deliverable format. Privacy guidance is presented before photo intake.

plugins.name: trunk
plugins.description: Flaky test detection, root cause analysis, and fix suggestions for development teams. Connects to the Trunk MCP server to analyze flaky tests in your CI pipeline, explain why they're flaky, and suggest targeted fixes.

plugins.name: tsm
plugins.description: Manage Transmission BitTorrent client from Claude Code. Add torrents, monitor downloads, set per-file priorities, apply seeding policies by label, bulk-replace trackers, and automate torrent workflows, all through natural language. Supports JSON output for scripting, macOS Keychain auth, multi-server profiles, and advanced filtering (e.g., "ratio>2.0 AND label:movies AND age<7d").

plugins.name: turbocharge
plugins.description:
You found a plugin that makes your coding agent actually good. One thing bothers you. So you fork it and change it.

Three weeks later, upstream ships a release with fixes you want. Now you have a choice: manually hunt through the diff to reapply your changes, or leave your fork to rot.

Turbocharge is a set of three skills that manage this cycle for you. Fork freely. Customize intentionally. Sync automatically.

plugins.name: twining
plugins.description: Agent coordination — shared blackboard, decision tracking, and context assembly

plugins.name: twitter-command-center
plugins.description: Full Twitter/X data access and posting from Claude Code. Read user profiles, timelines, mentions, followers, tweet search (Latest/Top), replies, quotes, trending topics, lists, communities, and Spaces. Post tweets via OAuth relay — no passwords, no cookies, no proxies. Powered by AIsa API with pay-per-use pricing .

plugins.name: tycono
plugins.description:
AI team orchestration for Claude Code. Instead of one AI doing everything, Tycono gives you a team — CTO designs architecture, Engineer writes code, QA validates, Designer handles UI — all coordinating automatically while you watch in real-time.

  Key features:
  - Multi-agent collaboration: CEO supervises, dispatches tasks to specialized roles
  - Real-time observability: see what each team member is doing via activity stream
  - Domain agencies: install pre-built team configurations (gamedev, startup-mvp, solo-founder)
  - Custom agencies: create your own team with /tycono:agency-create (guided setup with auto-verification)
  - Knowledge persistence: AKB (Agentic Knowledge Base) accumulates insights across sessions
  - Tycono Channel: MCP-based real-time notifications pushed to your Claude Code session

plugins.name: typedeck
plugins.description: Generate professional presentations from natural language. Describe what you want to present and get a complete slide deck with charts, code blocks, diagrams, tables, quotes, speaker notes, and more. Output opens directly in Typedeck, the native macOS presentation app.

plugins.name: ui-kit
plugins.description:
147 zero-dependency React components with Aurora Fluid design. 5 skills for component discovery, code generation, design   
  system reference, tier selection, and accessibility auditing. 2 agents for architecture and a11y review. Auto-connects to hosted MCP  server.

plugins.name: uikit-max
plugins.description: Reviews UIKit code for modern best practices, covering deprecated APIs, Auto Layout, view controller lifecycle, accessibility, performance, concurrency, and the full iOS 26 overhaul — from iOS 13 through iOS 26.

plugins.name: uk-finance-accounting
plugins.description:
Give Claude deep UK accounting knowledge. This plugin replaces the generic finance responses with regulation-aware workflows built specifically for British businesses. It covers journal entries under FRS 102, VAT reconciliation with 9-box MTD returns, Companies House filing (annual accounts, confirmation statements, audit exemption rules), payroll with employer NIC and auto-enrolment pension calculations, and month-end close management with HMRC deadline tracking.

Built on and derived from Anthropic's official Finance & Accounting Plugin. Every US-specific element has been replaced with verified UK equivalents: FRS 102 instead of US GAAP, HMRC VAT and Making Tax Digital instead of US sales tax, employer NIC and auto-enrolment pension instead of FICA and 401(k). Four entirely new skills (VAT Reconciliation, MTD Filing, Companies House, PAYE/RTI Payroll) cover workflows that have no US equivalent.

Designed for sole traders, freelancers, SMBs, and their accountants. Includes 12 skills across 8 slash commands, references only verified FRS 102 standards and HMRC guidance, and ships with 2025/26 tax year rates. Connects to Xero, Sage, FreeAgent, Open Banking, and HMRC MTD API via MCP.

plugins.name: uk-legal
plugins.description:
Give Claude jurisdiction-aware legal knowledge covering 12 practice areas across England and Wales. The plugin grounds every response in verified UK statutes with section-level citations, correct 2025/26 thresholds and rates, and SRA-compliant disclaimers that distinguish legal information from legal advice.

Practice areas include: contract law (UCTA 1977, CRA 2015, Limitation Act 1980), employment law (ERA 1996, EA 2010, TUPE, IR35), UK GDPR and DPA 2018, company law (Companies Act 2006, ECCTA 2023), intellectual property (CDPA 1988, TMA 1994), property law (LPA 1925, Renters' Rights Act 2025, LTA 1954), financial services (FSMA 2000, Consumer Duty, SM&CR), competition law (CA 1998, DMCC Act 2024), consumer law (CRA 2015), litigation and CPR 1998, tax law (VAT/MTD, PAYE/RTI, CGT, SDLT), and regulatory bodies (ICO, FCA, CMA, SRA, HSE, TPR).

Includes 10 interactive calculators: ET time limit calculator with ACAS clock-stop, SDLT calculator with first-time buyer relief, Corporation Tax marginal relief calculator, UK GDPR lawful basis selector, TUPE applicability checker, IR35 status indicator, ICO breach assessment workflow, court fee calculator, auto-enrolment calculator, and retained EU law tracker. Built with hallucination prevention: the plugin only cites statutes that exist in its verified knowledge base. 12 skills, 12 slash commands.

plugins.name: ultimate-seo-geo
plugins.description: The definitive SEO + GEO skill for Claude. Run full site audits with scored findings (0-100), AI search optimization for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity, Schema.org JSON-LD generation, E-E-A-T assessment, CORE-EEAT 80-item content audit, CITE domain authority rating, entity optimization, and 23 Python diagnostic scripts. Three modes: Audit → Plan → Execute.

plugins.name: ultrapowers
plugins.description: Research-driven development workflow that ensures agents verify knowledge before writing code, extends Superpowers with deep research, skills auditing, and no auto-commits.

plugins.name: ultrapowers-dev
plugins.description: Development skills language best practices for multiple languages, framework patterns, agentic patterns, and architecture fundamentals.

plugins.name: ultraship
plugins.description: All-in-one builder toolkit for Claude Code. 22 automatic skills, 20 tools, 5 agents. Covers the full dev lifecycle — brainstorming, planning, TDD, code review, frontend design, SEO/GEO/AEO audits, Lighthouse performance, security hardening, and deployment. Skills activate automatically based on context. Run /ship to get a full ship-readiness scorecard.

plugins.name: understand-anything
plugins.description: Understand Anything is a Claude Code plugin that analyzes your project with a multi-agent pipeline, builds a knowledge graph of every file, function, class, and dependency, then gives you an interactive dashboard to explore it all visually. Stop reading code blind. Start seeing the big picture.

plugins.name: universal-basic-compute
plugins.description: Domain-agnostic agent toolkit for discovering and assembling free-tier resources into working outcomes. You state a goal; the master agent decomposes it into the minimum viable resource set, discovers and verifies free-tier services that can fulfill each component, and produces a concrete recipe to deploy the outcome. Ships with a compute domain (free-tier cloud services into deployed software) and self-expands into new domains — education, health, finance — as users bring new goals. Built around a six-agent protocol (master, discovery, verification, assembly, deployment, monitoring) with credential management, capability fingerprinting, and recipe versioning. Designed for people who want the outcome, not the procurement journey.

plugins.name: unstack
plugins.description: Analyzes any website's technology stack from a single URL using only public signals. Runs a five-phase investigation (HTTP headers, HTML source, cookies, asset URL patterns, framework path probing) against 100+ detection signatures, then produces either a styled HTML report or a quick chat summary. Every technology identified is backed by specific evidence (the exact header, cookie format, or URL pattern that revealed it), not guesses. No API keys, no headless browser, no external dependencies.

plugins.name: upfront
plugins.description: Force thinking before code. 20 skills that challenge your reasoning before generating a single line — adversarial feature definition, reviewability gates, requirements traceability, TDD builds, and audit trails. The AI asks first, suggests second.

plugins.name: upkeep
plugins.description:
macOS cleanup and update assistant for Claude Code.
Scans your Mac for reclaimable disk space, leftover app data, stale caches, broken LaunchAgents, and shell configuration drift, then helps you clean it up safely with your approval. It can also update your AI skills and developer package managers in one pass, including Homebrew, npm, pip, gems, and rustup.

Modes
	•	Deep — full 15-phase audit and cleanup
	•	Quick — fast cache cleanup plus Homebrew updates
	•	Audit — report only, with no changes made
	•	Update — refresh AI skills and package managers

plugins.name: urc
plugins.description: Control Codex and Gemini from the Claude app on your phone. URC spawns a lightweight Haiku relay that bridges your phone's Remote Control session to any Codex or Gemini pane running in tmux. One app, three AI ecosystems. Also includes a cross-CLI teams protocol for structured agent-to-agent communication via MCP.

plugins.name: usap-skills
plugins.description: 66 LLM security agent skills for the Unified Security Agent Platform (USAP). Covers threat detection, incident response, red team operations, cloud security, identity risk, compliance mapping, DevSecOps, and AI security. Use any skill standalone or as part of a USAP orchestration chain.

plugins.name: usectl
plugins.description: Deploy and manage full-stack projects on usectl — a managed Kubernetes platform that turns a GitHub repo into a live HTTPS app with PostgreSQL, S3 storage, and automatic SSL. Includes deployment skill with full lifecycle knowledge, MCP server integration for direct API access, and slash commands (/deploy, /status, /logs) for quick operations. One prompt deploys your entire project.

plugins.name: ux-superpowers
plugins.description:
User-centered design methodology for coding agents. Before you brainstorm solutions or write code, UX Superpowers guides you through structured UX discovery: identifying who you're building for (personas), what they're trying to accomplish (jobs-to-be-done), how they experience the problem today (user journey maps), and how you'll know if you succeeded (telemetry and success metrics). Accepts raw user research data (interviews,
surveys, support tickets, analytics) or guides discovery from scratch. Produces a UX Discovery Document that anchors all subsequent development. Currently ships 8 skills and works for any software type - web apps, CLIS, APIs, mobile, infrastructure, internal tools, games. Eventually there will be more skills that help in UX Discovery. Designed to complement the Superpowers plugin by owning the "what and why" before the "how".

plugins.name: vanikya-ai-mcp
plugins.description:
Vanikya AI MCP connects Claude Code to Vanikya AI platform, giving you image generation, SEO analysis, creative insights, and credits management all directly from Claude.                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Generate stunning images, videos, vectors, and lottie animations using 16+ models including GPT-Image-1.5, Flux 2 Pro, and Google's Nano Banana. Run AI-powered SEO audits on any URL (single or batch). Get creative scoring and branding feedback on images. Check your credit balance and top up  without leaving your terminal.                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
Powered by an OAuth-authenticated MCP server with guided skills that handle the full workflow: prompt enhancement, credit estimation, generation, and polling.

plugins.name: vanta
plugins.description: Vanta security and compliance platform integration for Claude Code — manage compliance programs, evidence collection, and security monitoring.

plugins.name: vanta-mcp-plugin
plugins.description:
The Vanta plugin connects Claude Code to Vanta's security and compliance platform through the Vanta MCP server. It combines Vanta's test-specific remediation intelligence with your local repository context to help you fix compliance failures faster.

What it does:
- Connects to Vanta's hosted MCP server via OAuth, giving Claude access to your tests, controls, vendors, vulnerabilities, policies, and framework requirements
- Adds a remediation skill that pulls test-specific remediation instructions from Vanta and combines them with your local repo to generate targeted IaC fixes
- Includes slash commands for streamlined test remediation workflows

Skills:
- Remediation — Describe a failing test or paste a test ID, and the plugin generates step-by-step remediation guidance. For IaC tests, it scans your repo and produces ready-to-apply code fixes for Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation, CDK, and other IaC tools.

Slash commands:

/vanta:list-tests — View failing compliance tests, prioritized by what you can fix from your current repo
/vanta:fix-test <testId> — Generate an IaC fix and open a pull request for a specific failing test

plugins.name: vaper
plugins.description: Status line widget that shows how much water you've boiled with Claude today by converting daily token usage into joules and milliliters of water heated from 20°C to 100°C.

plugins.name: varlock
plugins.description: Secure environment variable management with Varlock for secrets, API keys, credentials, and sensitive configuration.

plugins.name: varlock-skill
plugins.description: Secure environment variable management with schema validation and secret masking. Validates secrets are set correctly without exposing values in terminal output.

plugins.name: vault-pkm
plugins.description: Personal knowledge management for Claude Code. Connect to your Obsidian vault with 20 MCP tools, semantic search, wikilink graph traversal, template-based note creation, link health audits, and cross-session activity logging. Includes 3 autonomous agents and hooks for proactive knowledge capture.

plugins.name: vbnet-lsp-claude-plugin
plugins.description: vbnet-lsp adds Roslyn-powered VB.NET language intelligence to Claude Code through Language Server Protocol. It registers .vb files and launches vbnet-ls over stdio, enabling semantic diagnostics, completion, hover, definition/references navigation, and symbol-aware edits in VB.NET projects. The language server is distributed as the NuGet global tool DNAKode.VbNet.Lsp and validated in CI on Windows and Linux, including real Claude plugin validation and command checks.

plugins.name: vector-md-context-injector
plugins.description:
Vector-md-plugin provides hooks to automatically inject sub-tree scoped context files upon reading a file from said sub-tree. The injections are deduplicated per agent context. The skill file and CLAUDE.md loading hook provide guidance towards maintaining these files as a natural part of the work Claude Code does.

The idea is that these vector.md files form a knowledge graph that's automatically available to claude as needed.

plugins.name: velt
plugins.description: Add real-time collaboration to any React or Next.js app. AI-guided setup with codebase analysis, best-practice rules, and MCP-powered tooling for the Velt SDK. Includes commands for comments, presence, cursors, CRDT collaborative editing, and notifications.

plugins.name: venture-capital-intelligence
plugins.description: 9 skills for venture capital intelligence. 3 run on pure Claude reasoning. 6 run Claude + Python for deterministic outputs — screening startups, modeling financials, sizing markets, computing cap table waterfalls, scanning deal signals, and generating LP fund reports. Built from the best open-source VC tools.

plugins.name: veritasacta-verify
plugins.description:
Offline Ed25519 receipt verifier. Checks signed decision receipts, agent manifests, and audit bundles without contacting any server. The verifier is pure cryptographic math — it does not know or contact the issuer.

Verifies receipts from protect-mcp, Mission Control, or any system that produces Ed25519-signed envelopes over JCS-canonicalized JSON (RFC 8785). Apache-2.0 licensed with explicit patent grant.

Install: npx @veritasacta/verify@0.2.4 --self-test
IETF Draft: draft-farley-acta-signed-receipts

plugins.name: versori-skills
plugins.description:
The versori-skills plugin gives Claude Code the ability to create, build, deploy, and monitor production-grade data integrations, entirely from the command line. Rather than stitching together simple automations, Versori enables Claude to build complex, multi-workflow integrations with full TypeScript control using the versori-run SDK.

The plugin follows a research-first approach: before writing any code, Claude gathers and structures API documentation for each system involved, producing a grounded research document that becomes the single source of truth for the integration. This ensures generated code is accurate and well-informed rather than hallucinated.

From there, Claude manages the full integration lifecycle: bootstrapping projects, configuring systems and connections, generating type-safe TypeScript workflows, running local validation via Deno, and deploying to production with built-in safety checks like dry-run previews and project context validation.

  Key features:

  - Research-grounded code generation: Claude researches API documentation before writing code, with every fact linked to its source. Research documents are uploaded as project assets so future modifications retain full context.
  - Full project lifecycle management: Create, sync, deploy, version, promote, and rollback integrations without leaving the terminal. Supports multiple environments with version promotion between them.
  - Complex multi-workflow integrations: Build integrations with scheduled ETL pipelines, webhook handlers, durable long-running workflows, and stateful batch processing using KV storage, going well beyond the simple trigger-action automations of platforms.
  - Embedded integrations (multi-user): Supports user activations and connection management for embedded integration scenarios where end-users bring their own credentials.
  - Secure credential handling: Credentials are referenced as environment variables and resolved at runtime. They are never embedded in commands or stored in code.
  - Built-in deployment safety: Dry-run mode for all destructive operations.

plugins.name: very-good-ai-flutter-plugin
plugins.description:
Production-quality Flutter and Dart skills from Very Good Ventures. Provides opinionated, best-practice guidance for accessibility (WCAG 2.1), BLoC state management, testing
  (unit, widget, golden), Material 3 theming, GoRouter navigation, internationalization, layered architecture, static security (OWASP Mobile Top 10), and license compliance — plus
   automated dart analyze and dart format hooks that run after every code edit. Skills activate automatically based on context or via slash commands.

plugins.name: vibe-coding
plugins.description: Schema-first architecture discipline for AI-assisted development. Enforces tables → RLS → features ordering, generates paste-ready Claude Code prompts, and manages build queue batches. Built from the methodology behind a 511-table production app with 1,016 security policies.

plugins.name: vibe-radar
plugins.description:
VibeRadar turns Claude Code conversation history into a structured analysis of how a developer collaborates with AI. It classifies each user message by conversational position — opening, directing, correcting, confirming, or continuing — extracts countable signals, and scores six distinct collaboration dimensions using a deterministic formula baseline plus a bounded qualitative adjustment (maximum ±15) that must cite evidence.
The result is a self-contained, single-file HTML report that includes an overall grade (S/A/B/C/D), a radar chart, a behavioral MBTI collaboration archetype derived from reasoning patterns and directive style rather than simple keyword matching, and 3-7 actionable suggestions grounded in real session data.
VibeRadar is privacy-first by design: everything runs locally, session files are accessed read-only from ~/.claude/projects/, and there are no network calls, API keys, or telemetry. Zero dependencies, under 200KB.

plugins.name: vibe-replay
plugins.description: Turn AI coding sessions into shareable, interactive replays. Auto-generates GitHub PR artifacts (markdown + animated GIF), self-contained HTML replays, and session analytics. Supports Claude Code and Cursor.

plugins.name: vibecircle
plugins.description: See what your friends are building. A social feed for friend groups who vibe code — share screenshots, deploy links, and coding activity with your circle. Features: auto-capture from Claude Code via /share command, live app embeds, reactions and comments, ambient presence (see who's building right now), and AI-powered project explanations (BYOK). Includes /circle setup for zero-friction device code authentication, and /share for posting updates. Open source, MIT licensed.

plugins.name: vibeguard
plugins.description: Security auditor and hardener for vibe-coded projects. 170+ vulnerability checks across 24 categories including injection, XSS, auth bypass, IDOR, Supabase RLS, prompt injection, exposed secrets, rate limiting, CORS, and auth provider misconfigs. Three commands: /vibeguard:audit (scan and report), /vibeguard:fix (patch findings), /vibeguard:harden (add security infrastructure). Includes a pre-commit hook that blocks git commits containing hardcoded secrets.

plugins.name: vibekanban
plugins.description:
VibeKanban is a dev progress kanban board that runs entirely inside Claude Code. When you code with Claude, every task is automatically tracked — started, completed, and reported — on a local kanban board with a browser-based UI.

No cloud service, no sign-up, no npm install. Just a Python server on localhost and a single HTML file. Claude creates tasks when you ask for work, moves them through columns as progress happens, records git diff stats on completion, and writes work reports you can review later in the web UI.

Multi-project support lets you manage several codebases from one board. Switch between projects with tabs, drag cards between columns, and view completed work grouped by date, category, or development phase.

plugins.name: vibelearn
plugins.description: VibeLearn silently watches your Claude Code sessions, extracts the concepts you encounter while building, and turns them into personalized quiz questions — so you actually retain what you learn. After each session, run `vl quiz` to review with adaptive spaced repetition across 7 question formats (multiple choice, spot the bug, code reading, fill in the blank, open-ended, true/false, ordering). Difficulty adjusts automatically: 3 correct answers in a row promotes you to the next level, one wrong answer drops you back. Senior-level open-ended answers are evaluated by a 5-dimension AI rubric.

plugins.name: video-to-code-skill
plugins.description: Inputs the content of any video into Claude Code prompt / context window as a multimodal bundle of voice transcription and data summary, time synced with keyframes - screenshots of key moments from the video so it can be used for all further requests related to that content.

plugins.name: visual-explainer
plugins.description: An agent skill that turns complex terminal output into styled HTML pages you actually want to read.

plugins.name: visual-explainer-marketplace
plugins.description: Plugin distribution for visual-explainer

plugins.name: visual-eyes
plugins.description: Give Claude Code the ability to see running web applications. Visual Eyes captures screenshots via Playwright, lets Claude analyze the UI visually, auto-fix layout bugs, and run pixel-level regression testing. Works with any localhost app, zero config needed. Supports desktop, mobile, and full-page captures.

plugins.name: visual-test-pro
plugins.description: Visual Test Pro is a Claude Code plugin that visually tests your entire app in Chrome, catches security vulnerabilities, handles authentication automatically, and delivers a plain English report your non-technical co-founder could read.

plugins.name: vitals
plugins.description: Codebase vital signs — hotspot detection, ROI-ranked diagnosis, co-change coupling, knowledge risk, and AI provenance tracking

plugins.name: viv
plugins.description:
Turn Claude into a Viv expert. Design, develop, and debug code and content for Viv, a system for building simulated worlds where storylines emerge from character activity.

Viv offers technical narrative designers a custom programming language affording rich specifications of character actions, as well as constructs that drive *story sifting*—the task of identifying emergent storylines in a given simulation instance, such as a videogame playthrough.

This plugin maintains a synced copy of the Viv codebase, and bundles special commands for efficiently navigating it, allowing Claude to search the full language reference, compiler source, runtime source, and other material anytime it needs to look something up.

Skills include `/setup` for fully automated Viv installation and project setup, `/write` for authoring Viv code from a brief, `/fix` for diagnosing compiler and runtime errors, `/design` for worldbuilding and architecture planning, and `/build` for writing integration code.

plugins.name: vivid
plugins.description: Open a Vivid Business account directly from your AI chat. Share your company details or upload registration documents - the plugin extracts the data, pre-fills the onboarding form, and gives you a link to complete verification.

plugins.name: vivid-mcp
plugins.description: Open a Vivid Business account directly from your AI chat. Upload company registration documents or share details in conversation — the plugin extracts data, pre-fills everything, and generates an onboarding link

plugins.name: vm-disk-cleanup
plugins.description: Prevent and recover from disk-full errors in Claude's working environment — both Cowork session VMs and Claude Code sandboxes. Clears npm/pip caches, node_modules, Python bytecode, build outputs, and temp files that accumulate during long sessions.

plugins.name: voice-bridge
plugins.description: Give Claude Code a voice with multi-engine text-to-speech. Speaks responses aloud using 5  TTS engines (edge-tts, ElevenLabs, Kokoro, macOS say, espeak-ng). Free by default.  edge-tts uses Microsoft Neural voices with no API key. Includes a Stop hook for automatic speech, a /speak skill for on-demand use, and an MCP server with speak, set_engine, get_status, and list_voices tools. Text is automatically filtered to remove code blocks, API keys, file paths, and markdown before speaking.

plugins.name: voicenter
plugins.description: Manage Voicenter Cloud contact center real time communication with your own app or CRM using claude code and voicenter skills and mcp plugin. control calls, get real time webhooks, active auodialer campiagns, reports, users and Queues, and much more.

plugins.name: voila-api
plugins.description: Definitive guide for the Voila API. Covers shipment creation (Manual/Smart Shipping), real-time tracking, detailed history, manifesting, collections, webhooks, and third-party integrations (Sorted, Peoplevox, Mintsoft, Veeqo, JD).

plugins.name: volatixclaudesetup
plugins.description: Its a full packs of command, skill, hook and mcp

plugins.name: voltaire
plugins.description: Revenue intelligence for SaaS paywall conversion. Voltaire connects Stripe data, installs behavioral tracking into the codebase, and runs three AI agents on every /voltaire: timing analysis, cohort comparison, and churn tracking to surface where conversion is being lost and what to fix.

plugins.name: vps-ops
plugins.description: Monitor and manage a Linux VPS running WordPress, PM2 services, and Nginx. Checks service health, analyses Nginx logs for AI crawler activity, verifies backups, manages redirects, and runs WordPress site health checks. Includes 6 skills: health-check, log-analysis, backup-check, redirect, site-health, and wp-audit.

plugins.name: vscode-review
plugins.description: Receive line-level code review feedback from VS Code directly in your Claude Code session. Users annotate code in VS Code's native comment UI, and structured reviews with file context, line numbers, and comments are pushed into the conversation via the Channels API.

plugins.name: vvuq4ai
plugins.description: Verify AI-generated STEM claims against curated knowledge bases, IEEE standards, and mathematical checks. VVUQ4AI runs physics constants, dimensional analysis, and standards compliance checks (IEEE 802.3, NSF Biosketch) on claims Claude generates or encounters, returning structured verdicts with confidence scores.

plugins.name: vynn
plugins.description:
Self-improving AI workflows & backtesting. Run backtests, optimize prompts, manage
  workflows, and set up schedules directly in Claude Code.

plugins.name: waggle
plugins.description: Waggle is a search engine for AI agents that implement Google's A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol. This plugin lets Claude discover agents by capability and invoke them directly from your conversation.

plugins.name: wasp
plugins.description: Enhances Claude for developing full-stack web apps with Wasp (React, Node.js, Prisma)

plugins.name: wave-planner
plugins.description: Transform project issues into execution-ready implementation plans with risk prediction, wave-based organization, and TDD workflow.

plugins.name: wave-planner-skill
plugins.description: Transform Linear project issues into execution-ready wave plans with risk prediction and specialist agent assignments. Orders work by risk, not readiness.

plugins.name: waves-exovian
plugins.description:
Waves is a product development framework that turns ideas into production software through a structured sequence of AI-driven artifacts. It provides the AI agent with persistent memory, project awareness, and a clear methodology — so every session starts informed, every task traces to a purpose, and every decision is recorded.

The framework guides the complete lifecycle: validate the idea (feasibility analysis with Monte Carlo and Bayesian projections and kill criteria), distill findings into validated facts (foundation), define what the product is and why it exists (blueprint with capabilities, flows, rules, and success metrics), plan delivery in organic cycles called waves (roadmaps with phases and milestones), track implementation per task (logbooks with objectives, scope, and completion guides), execute code aligned with project rules and business intent (objectives-implement), and document what was accomplished (resolutions).

Each artifact feeds the next. Each session picks up where the last one left off. The agent reads the blueprint before writing code, follows extracted coding rules, alerts when work doesn't align with the product definition, and preserves context so nothing is lost between sessions.

plugins.name: wayfinder-connector
plugins.description: Connect Claude to Frametric Wayfinder — the charity and nonprofit intelligence platform. Search, explore, and enrich data on 400,000+ organisations across 6 countries (England & Wales, US, Scotland, Ireland, Canada, Australia). Provides 6 tools: charity search, profile lookup, financial analysis, sector browsing, classification data, and benchmarking. Ideal for fundraisers, grant-makers, researchers, and anyone working with the nonprofit sector.

plugins.name: wealth-stack
plugins.description: AI-powered wealth management plugin for Indian investors. PMS/AIF analysis, NRI tax planning, family office advisory, goal-based SIPs, SEBI compliance.

plugins.name: webscan
plugins.description: Client-side web security scanner — detects secrets, vulnerable JS libraries, misconfigurations, XSS sinks, CORS issues, and more

plugins.name: webscanner
plugins.description: A webscanner plugin that performs automated client-side web security assessments. Point it at any domain and it produces a structured Markdown pentest report covering secrets exposure, vulnerable JS libraries, security misconfigurations, XSS sinks, CORS issues, and more with zero manual setup required.

plugins.name: website-quality-checker
plugins.description: Webpage quality evaluator based on Google Search Quality Rater Guidelines (QRG). Inspects page purpose, MC quality, E-E-A-T, reputation, and spam signals to produce a graded report (S/A/B/C/D).

plugins.name: wecom
plugins.description: WeCom (Enterprise WeChat) Channel Plugin for Claude Code — enables two-way messaging between Claude  Code sessions and WeCom users via AI Bot or Self-built App mode.

plugins.name: weilliptic-receipts
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that audits AI-assisted code changes. Automatically records every file edit, session, and commit as a verifiable receipt providing tamper-proof provenance for AI-generated code.

plugins.name: wezterm-agent-cards
plugins.description: WezTerm agent sidebar — curses TUI showing Claude Code sessions as stacked status cards with hooks for real-time state tracking.

plugins.name: wezterm-agent-cards-multipanel-sidebar-with-notifications-inspir
plugins.description:
A Claude Code plugin that adds a curses-based sidebar to WezTerm showing your Claude Code sessions as stacked status cards with real-time state tracking. Be notified if your agent needs you!

Strongly inspired by CMUX, a native macOS terminal that surfaces AI agent status through vertical tabs and notification rings. WezTerm Agent Cards brings the same idea to Linux (and anywhere WezTerm runs) — using Claude Code hooks, a Python TUI, and a thin Lua module instead of a dedicated terminal app.

plugins.name: whats-new
plugins.description: Claude Code ships features every day — new tools, modes, integrations, and workflows. whats-new brings feature discovery into your session so you never have to leave your terminal to learn what's available. Get a feature of the day when you start a session, describe what you're working on to find relevant capabilities, or browse the full catalog of 50+ features across 10 categories. It's like having a teammate who's read every changelog and knows exactly when to mention the right feature.

plugins.name: whatsapp
plugins.description:
WhatsApp channel for Claude Code. Bridges WhatsApp Business Cloud API
  messages into Claude Code sessions via MCP. Includes reply and react tools,
  webhook-based message delivery, full access control with pairing flow and
  allowlists, media upload/download support, and /whatsapp:access and
  /whatsapp:configure skills for managing access and credentials.

plugins.name: whatsapp-channel
plugins.description:
WhatsApp channel for Claude Code. Message Claude from your phone, get replies back, and approve tool use remotely.
Built on Baileys (WhatsApp Web multi-device). Features QR/pairing code linking, access control with allowlists, group chat support (mention-gated), media handling, and auto-reconnect.

plugins.name: whatsapp-mcp
plugins.description: Connect Claude to WhatsApp — search messages, read conversations, send texts and media, and manage business outreach. Includes a conversation memory system that learns from every interaction. Gives Claude full access to your WhatsApp account through an MCP bridge.

plugins.name: why
plugins.description: Combat cognitive debt from Claude AI-assisted development

plugins.name: why-is-my-claude-dumb
plugins.description: Analyze your environment and recommend official marketplace plugins to make Claude Code smarter

plugins.name: wicked-garden
plugins.description:
Wicked Garden — AI-Native SDLC

  A full software development lifecycle as a single Claude Code plugin. 14 domains, 80 specialist agents, 152 commands — covering everything from requirements through production operations.

  What makes it different from a good CLAUDE.md: it's executable infrastructure, not passive guidance. Hooks enforce workflow gates before Claude sees your prompt. Context from memory, search, and project state is assembled automatically on
  every turn. Decisions persist across sessions. Quality gates actually block progression when evidence is missing.

  Works standalone with zero external dependencies. Local SQLite storage. No API keys, no cloud services, no setup beyond install.

  Core systems:

  - Crew — Signal-driven project workflows with 8 phases (clarify → design → build → test → review → operate), 7-dimension complexity scoring, hard-enforced quality gates, and multi-perspective consensus review for high-stakes decisions
  - Smaht — Automatic context assembly on every prompt via 3-tier routing (hot/fast/slow). Surfaces relevant memories, code search results, kanban state, and crew context without you asking
  - Mem — 3-tier persistent memory (working → episodic → semantic) with auto-consolidation, tag-based search, and access-frequency ranking. Decisions from month-old sessions surface when relevant
  - Search — Code intelligence with symbol search, blast radius analysis, data lineage tracing, and service map discovery
  - Jam — AI brainstorming with dynamic persona focus groups and multi-model council sessions using installed LLM CLIs (Codex, Gemini, Copilot)

Plus specialist agents for engineering, product, platform/DevSecOps, QE, data, delivery, agentic architecture, and on-demand personas.

plugins.name: wiki-knowledge-complier
plugins.description:
A. wiki-knowledge-compiler turns Claude Code into an AI-powered knowledge management system that:

B. Workflow
Ingest → Compile → Link → Query → Write-back → Improve

Each interaction improves your knowledge base over time - turning answers into reusable assets instead of one-off responses.

- Ingests raw sources (PDFs, markdown, notes, URL stubs) into an immutable archive.
- Extracts atomic concepts, creates summaries, and builds topic pages — all with provenance.
- Queries the knowledge base with citations and writes back reusable answers.
- Maintains structural health: detects orphans, duplicates, stale pages, and broken links.
- Synthesizes cross-cutting insights with explicit confidence ratings and uncertainty markers.
- Everything is plain markdown with YAML frontmatter. No databases, no cloud services, no proprietary formats.

plugins.name: wiki-wonka
plugins.description: wiki-wonka is an agent-driven system for building and maintaining a structured, evolving wiki of knowledge. Instead of relying on stateless retrieval (RAG) for every query, wiki-wonka compiles and curates knowledge into a persistent, interlinked set of Markdown pages. The LLM agent handles all the summarizing, cross-referencing, and bookkeeping—so your knowledge base compounds and improves over time.

plugins.name: wikipedia
plugins.description: Fetch Wikipedia articles and data. WebFetch returns 403 on all Wikipedia URLs due to Python user-agent blocking — this plugin provides the curl workaround.

plugins.name: windows-desktop-com-plugin-for-mail
plugins.description: Claude Cowork connector for Microsoft Outlook desktop. Read, triage, draft, send, and schedule — all via local COM. No Azure AD, no IT approvals, no cloud credentials.

plugins.name: windows-screenshot-paste
plugins.description: Enables Ctrl+V screenshot pasting in Claude Code terminal on Windows. Installs an AutoHotkey v2 script that saves clipboard images as PNG files and types the file path into the terminal so Claude can read them directly.

plugins.name: windsor-ai
plugins.description: Windsor.ai plugin for Claude Code — query ad spend, campaigns, and analytics from 325+ marketing, analytics and CRM platforms directly from your terminal.

plugins.name: wiq
plugins.description: Bardeen wiq plugin — workflow automation with multi-agent orchestration and OAuth-secured remote MCP.

plugins.name: wix
plugins.description: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. CLI development skills for dashboard extensions, backend APIs, site widgets, and service plugins with the Wix Design System, plus MCP server for site management.

plugins.name: wmux-orchestrator
plugins.description:
Multi-agent task orchestration for Claude Code. Decomposes       
  complex development tasks into parallel Claude Code agents       
  coordinated through dependency-aware waves with visual terminal  
  panes and automated review. Works standalone with native
  subagents or with wmux for visible agent panes. Features include 
  dependency-aware wave planning, file zone enforcement per worker 
  to prevent conflicts, and post-orchestration automated review    
  with auto-fix.

plugins.name: wokku
plugins.description: Deploy and manage apps on Wokku — the open-source Heroku alternative — directly from Claude Code using natural language

plugins.name: wonda
plugins.description:
AI-powered content generation and social media automation from the terminal. Generate images, videos, music, and speech with 20+ AI models (Sora, Seedance, Kling, NanoBanana, ElevenLabs, Suno). Edit videos with TikTok-style captions, overlays, merging, and audio mixing. Publish directly to Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and Reddit. Scrape
competitors, track analytics, and run full content pipelines - all through the Wonda CLI. The skill teaches Claude model selection, prompt strategies, chaining patterns, and 24 content creation workflows.

plugins.name: wordpress-com
plugins.description: Building WordPress themes and sites from scratch can be complex - theme.json, block markup, template parts, design systems, responsive layouts. This plugin handles it for you. You describe your site (e.g., “A landing page for my pottery studio called Clay & Fire”), pick from 3 generated design directions, and get a fully deployed theme on a local WordPress Studio site.

plugins.name: wordpress-mcp
plugins.description: Manage WordPress sites directly from Claude using the WordPress MCP Adapter. Connect Claude to any WordPress 6.9+ site and manage content, users, settings, and WooCommerce — all through conversation.

plugins.name: wordpress-playground
plugins.description: WordPress Playground toolkit for AI agents. Provides skills for spinning up disposable WordPress instances via the Playground CLI (auto-mounting local plugins/themes, switching WP/PHP versions, building snapshots, Xdebug debugging) and for authoring Playground Blueprint JSON files (schema, steps, resources, bundles, common pitfalls). Also provides MCP tools for interacting with a Playground instance running in the browser — managing sites, reading/writing files in the virtual filesystem, executing PHP, making authenticated REST API requests, and navigating pages. Use the CLI skill when you need to mount local project files into WordPress. Use the MCP tools when working with a browser-based Playground instance.

plugins.name: wordpress-publisher
plugins.description: Full WordPress publishing pipeline for Claude Code and Cowork. Deploy posts with JSON-LD schema, optimise images to WebP with SEO metadata, manage Nginx redirects, audit content against 28+ compliance checks, and monitor site health — all from natural language. No WordPress dashboard required. Includes 5 skills: wp-deploy, wp-audit, image-seo, redirect-manager, and site-health.

plugins.name: worker-k
plugins.description: AI workforce skills for office automation — Excel, Word, PDF, research, bank reconciliation, and more. Built for accounting and professional service firms. 8 specialized skills that turn Claude Code into a capable office assistant: create and  analyze spreadsheets, generate Word documents, extract data from PDFs, conduct structured  research on tax/audit/regulatory topics, automate bank reconciliations, parse claim forms,   and update audit letters.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Structured workflow orchestration for AI agents via finite-state machines

plugins.name: workflow-toolkit
plugins.description: Get up to speed in any codebase, any size. Non-opinionated workflow plugin with session journaling, local task tracking, GitHub issue sync, knowledge base generation, and lifecycle hooks. All backed by SQLite, all local.

plugins.name: workos
plugins.description: Official WorkOS skills that help Cursor write correct code for the full WorkOS platform — AuthKit (Next.js, React, React Router, TanStack Start, SvelteKit, Vite, vanilla JS), SSO/SAML, Directory Sync/SCIM, RBAC, FGA, MFA, Vault, Audit Logs, Admin Portal, webhooks/events, and backend SDKs in Node, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, .NET, Kotlin, and Elixir. Includes step-by-step migration guides from Auth0, Clerk, Cognito, Firebase, Supabase, Stytch, Descope, and Better Auth. A router skill automatically loads the right reference file for your task, so Cursor gets accurate WorkOS-specific context and avoids the hallucinations LLMs commonly produce for auth APIs.

plugins.name: workshop-mode
plugins.description:
Voice-triggered dev environment setup for macOS. Type a phrase in Claude Code and your terminals snap into a grid across your screens, music starts playing, and apps tile into place. Configurable trigger phrase, music, terminal themes, and multi-monitor layouts.

Ala Tony Stark.

plugins.name: worktale-claude-code-plugin
plugins.description:
Automatically narrates your coding sessions into a daily work journal. When you type /worktale, the AI agent starts capturing the "why" behind every commit — intent, decisions, trade-offs, and problems solved. After
each git commit, it runs `worktale note` to append a 1-2 sentence narrative to your local Worktale journal. At end of day, run `worktale digest` to see your full story: AI-narrated context alongside commit stats,
module activity, and streaks. All data stays local in a SQLite database on your machine. Requires the Worktale CLI (npm install -g worktale).

plugins.name: wozcode
plugins.description:
A suite of smart coding tools that help you build better, cheaper, and faster. 

WozCode cuts Claude Code costs 25-55% through token optimization, speeds up common workflows, and improves output quality. Drop-in replacement for built-in tools -- install and start saving immediately.

plugins.name: wrightward
plugins.description: Multi-agent coordination. When two or more Claude Code sessions work in the same repo, wrightward blocks conflicting writes, injects awareness context, and gives the sessions a peer-to-peer message bus (with six MCP tools) to hand off tasks, watch files, and wake each other up via Claude Code channels. Optionally enables a discord bridge for remotely controlling agent coordination.

plugins.name: ws
plugins.description: ws is a working set manager for Claude Code. Use /ws:map to describe a feature and Claude automatically identifies relevant files across your codebase, adding them to a focused, navigable list. Use /ws:install to set up the ws CLI on any OS. Working sets are branch-scoped and persistent — switch git branches and your context switches with you. Built for AI-assisted coding workflows where you need to track a curated set of files rather than browse your entire project tree.

plugins.name: wu-whatsapp
plugins.description: WhatsApp integration for Claude Code — send messages, search chats, manage groups via wu-cli

plugins.name: x-content-intelligence
plugins.description: Scrape and analyze content from X (Twitter) to identify trending topics, viral patterns, and what tone resonates with audiences. Powered by Apify actors. Use to research competitive intelligence, content strategy, and audience insights from X.

plugins.name: xcode-cloud
plugins.description: Apple Xcode Cloud CI/CD integration. Monitor builds, diagnose failures, trigger workflows, and manage your iOS/macOS CI pipeline directly from Claude Code. Provides 21 MCP tools, 7 skills, and 3 specialized agents for build analysis, pipeline optimization, and flaky test detection, all powered by the App Store Connect API.

plugins.name: xilinx-suite
plugins.description: An AI coding skill (Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw) that turns natural language into production-ready Vivado / Vitis HLS / Vitis Unified / PetaLinux scripts. Describe what you want to build, and get runnable Tcl, XDC, shell scripts, and C/C++ templates -- covering the complete FPGA/MPSoC design flow from HLS algorithm to boot image.

plugins.name: xpoz-social-intelligence
plugins.description: Real-time social media analysis from Twitter/X and Instagram - brand sentiment, competitive intelligence, and influencer discovery

plugins.name: youdotcom-agent-skills
plugins.description: Skills-only plugin: 8 integration skills for AI SDK, Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI, crewAI, LangChain, Teams.ai, direct API, and CLI. No MCP servers declared. Excellent security posture (W011 defense throughout). Fix PR #24 merged — .claude-plugin/plugin.json added.

plugins.name: youtube-transcriber
plugins.description: Transcribe YouTube videos and playlists using browser-based caption extraction. Works with any video that has auto-generated or manual captions — no API key, no external service, zero configuration. Supports single videos and full playlists in any language. Outputs timestamped transcripts ready for further processing.

plugins.name: zapier
plugins.description: Connect 8,000+ apps to your AI workflow. Discover, enable, and execute Zapier actions directly from your client.

plugins.name: zeabur
plugins.description: CLI skills for deploying, managing, and troubleshooting services on Zeabur — a cloud deployment platform. Covers the full lifecycle: project creation, service deployment, template management, domain registration & DNS, server provisioning, environment variables, logs, and common issue diagnosis.

plugins.name: zflow
plugins.description: Multi-agent development workflow orchestrator with structured phases: brainstorm, research, design, review, implement, QA, and document.

plugins.name: zilliz
plugins.description: Zilliz Cloud management plugin — 14 skills covering cluster lifecycle, collection schema, vector search, index tuning, bulk import, RBAC, backups, monitoring. No MCP server — pure skills/commands.

plugins.name: zoho-mail-health-check
plugins.description: Daily health check plugin for Zoho Mail accounts. Verifies that mail accounts are reachable, reads recent inbox messages, sends test emails, and saves a structured pass/fail report to the workspace. Designed for automated daily monitoring of business email accounts.

plugins.name: zoom-plugin
plugins.description: Claude plugin for planning, building, and debugging Zoom integrations across REST APIs, SDKs, webhooks, bots, and MCP workflows.

plugins.name: zscaler-mcp-server
plugins.description: Connect AI agents to the Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange platform. Provides 200+ tools across 8 services — ZPA (private access), ZIA (internet access), ZDX (digital experience), ZCC (client connector), ZTW (workload security), ZIdentity, EASM (attack surface management), and Z-Insights (security analytics). Includes 20 guided skills for application onboarding, policy management, incident investigation, and cross-product troubleshooting. Read-only by default with opt-in write operations.

plugins.name: zuckerbot
plugins.description: The Meta Ads toolkit for AI agents. 50 MCP tools for campaign management, creative analysis, audience building, conversion tracking (CAPI), and competitor research. Create, launch, monitor, and optimise Meta ad campaigns directly from Claude Code. Free tier available.
